title: @0xfinkus: A $599 Mac Mini can replace a $5,500/year AI stack Not a new model. Not a prompt hack. Mac Mini M4 + Ollama + Claude Cod

whyItMatters: A $599 Mac Mini can replace a $5,500/year AI stack Not a new model. Not a prompt hack. Mac Mini M4 + Ollama + Claude Code. Same workflow. Different economics. Most developers pay for every token. The smarter setup is local for 80%, cloud for 20%. $23/month instead of $459. Apple built a computer. Developers turned it into an AI server.
